case_title: MOHAMED AWAD VS. NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AWAD, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AWAD, MOHAMED ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AWAD, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROLYN BROWN--DENTAL DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AWAD, MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC. $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER, INC.
